generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former intelligence analyst, I've seen firsthand how vital our alliances are for national security. While some argue we should go it alone, the reality is that coordinated defense networks deter threats more effectively than any single nation could. Our partners share the burden, freeing up resources for domestic priorities. It's not about blind loyalty—it's about smart, practical security. #StrongerTogether #NationalSecurity
